description_long: This is a stylized depiction of a young boy standing with arms extended horizontally to the sides, resembling a T-pose. He has short, straight, dark hair and a determined facial expression. The child is dressed in a short-sleeve shirt and knee-length shorts, both of which are simple in design and fit loosely. His feet are bare, and his limbs are proportionate to a pre-adolescent child. The overall form is smooth and cartoon-like, with minimal surface detail and no visible accessories or objects carried. The figure is anatomically consistent with a child of approximately 8-10 years old.
description: A stylized young boy in a T-pose, wearing a short-sleeve shirt and knee-length shorts, barefoot and with short dark hair.
description_view_0: Front view showing the boy's face, chest, and outstretched arms, with clear visibility of his shirt and shorts.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, nose, and the side seam of the clothing, with one arm and leg visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shirt, and shorts, with both arms and legs extended backward.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, arm, and leg, mirroring the left side but from the opposite direction.
attribute_hairstyle: short straight hair, combed to the side
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
